name: collectionByIdentifier
supportNotes: Supports id and handle identifier branches against effective local collection state. customId currently returns null until collection unique-metafield evidence exists.

name: collectionByHandle
supportNotes: Deprecated Shopify root supported as a handle lookup over effective local collection state.

name: publishablePublish
supportNotes: HAR-177/HAR-163 slices: stages generic Publishable mutations locally when the publishable ID is a Product or Collection. Product-specific productPublish/productUnpublish remain the deeper product publication parity roots; unsupported Publishable targets return local userErrors instead of proxying upstream.

name: publishablePublishToCurrentChannel
supportNotes: HAR-177 product slice: stages generic Publishable mutations locally when the publishable ID is a Product. Product-specific productPublish/productUnpublish remain the deeper product publication parity roots; non-product Publishable targets return local userErrors instead of proxying upstream.

name: publishableUnpublish
supportNotes: HAR-177/HAR-163 slices: stages generic Publishable mutations locally when the publishable ID is a Product or Collection. Product-specific productPublish/productUnpublish remain the deeper product publication parity roots; unsupported Publishable targets return local userErrors instead of proxying upstream.

name: publishableUnpublishToCurrentChannel
supportNotes: HAR-177 product slice: stages generic Publishable mutations locally when the publishable ID is a Product. Product-specific productPublish/productUnpublish remain the deeper product publication parity roots; non-product Publishable targets return local userErrors instead of proxying upstream.

name: shopPolicyUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-173: stages legal policy updates locally by ShopPolicyType, preserves raw mutation requests for commit replay, and overlays downstream shop.shopPolicies reads without proxying supported requests upstream.

name: metafieldDefinition
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 definition read root. Registry-only declared gap until live capture, explicit comparison targets, and local metafield-definition modeling exist.

name: metafieldDefinitions
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 definition catalog root. Registry-only declared gap until owner-type-aware snapshot/live overlay semantics exist.

name: standardMetafieldDefinitionTemplates
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 standard template catalog root used before standardMetafieldDefinitionEnable. Registry-only declared gap until template catalog capture and modeling exist.

name: metafieldDefinitionCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Do not proxy as supported until metafield-definition state, validation, and affected value migration semantics are modeled.

name: metafieldDefinitionUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires immutable identity checks and validation job semantics before support.

name: metafieldDefinitionDelete
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires deleteAllAssociatedMetafields behavior and asynchronous associated-value deletion semantics before support.

name: metafieldDefinitionPin
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires pinned-position ordering semantics before support.

name: metafieldDefinitionUnpin
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires pinned-position ordering semantics before support.

name: standardMetafieldDefinitionEnable
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires standard template catalog modeling plus created-definition semantics before support.

name: discountCodeAppCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only app-managed discount safety gap. Unsupported runtime requests still use the generic passthrough escape hatch, which would hit Shopify, because Shopify Functions app-discount staging requires captured appDiscountType/functionId fixtures and a local model that does not execute external Function logic.

name: discountCodeAppUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only app-managed discount safety gap. Unsupported runtime requests still use the generic passthrough escape hatch, which would hit Shopify, because Shopify Functions app-discount staging requires captured appDiscountType/functionId fixtures and a local model that does not execute external Function logic.

name: discountAutomaticAppCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only app-managed discount safety gap. Unsupported runtime requests still use the generic passthrough escape hatch, which would hit Shopify, because Shopify Functions app-discount staging requires captured appDiscountType/functionId fixtures and a local model that does not execute external Function logic.

name: discountAutomaticAppUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only app-managed discount safety gap. Unsupported runtime requests still use the generic passthrough escape hatch, which would hit Shopify, because Shopify Functions app-discount staging requires captured appDiscountType/functionId fixtures and a local model that does not execute external Function logic.

name: marketingActivities
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap. Needs live marketing app-scoped capture for list, filtering, and empty-connection behavior before snapshot or overlay support.

name: marketingActivity
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap. Needs live capture for ID lookup nullability and activity field shape before snapshot or overlay support.

name: marketingEvent
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap. Needs live capture for ID lookup nullability and event field shape before snapshot or overlay support.

name: marketingEvents
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap. Needs live marketing app-scoped capture for list, filtering, and empty-connection behavior before snapshot or overlay support.

name: marketingActivityCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for payload, validation, status transitions, and downstream read visibility.

name: marketingActivityUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for update payloads, userErrors, and downstream activity/event reads.

name: marketingActivityCreateExternal
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for external remoteId/UTM fields, userErrors, and downstream list/detail visibility.

name: marketingActivityUpdateExternal
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for external activity identity, status updates, and downstream list/detail visibility.

name: marketingActivityUpsertExternal
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for create-vs-update behavior, remoteId identity, and downstream list/detail visibility.

name: marketingActivityDeleteExternal
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for deletion payloads, unknown IDs, and downstream absence behavior.

name: marketingActivitiesDeleteAllExternal
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for asynchronous job payloads and blocked create/update behavior while deletion is pending.

name: marketingEngagementCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for activity-level and channel-level engagement metrics and report visibility.

name: marketingEngagementsDelete
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for channel-level deletion semantics and userErrors.

name: segment
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured read_customers segment detail baseline. Snapshot mode serves captured selected fields locally and returns Shopify-like null plus NOT_FOUND for unknown segment IDs.

name: segments
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured catalog baseline. Snapshot mode preserves captured cursor/pageInfo payloads when hydrated and otherwise returns an empty connection; broader search/sort grammar remains unsupported until captured.

name: segmentsCount
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured count precision baseline. Snapshot mode returns captured count/precision when hydrated and EXACT zero for empty local state.

name: segmentFilters
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured filter metadata baseline. Snapshot mode preserves captured selected filter fields or returns an empty connection when no metadata has been hydrated.

name: segmentFilterSuggestions
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured filter suggestion baseline for a search argument. Snapshot mode preserves captured suggestion payloads or returns an empty connection; uncaptured search grammar remains unsupported.

name: segmentValueSuggestions
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured value suggestion baseline for customer_tags. Snapshot mode preserves captured suggestion payloads or returns an empty connection; uncaptured filters remain unsupported.

name: segmentMigrations
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured migration catalog baseline. Snapshot mode preserves captured migration connection shape or returns an empty connection.

name: customerSegmentMembers
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap. Requires read_customers and unrestricted/protected-customer-data capture for member pagination, statistics, and empty membership behavior.

name: customerSegmentMembersQuery
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap. Requires read_customers and unrestricted/protected-customer-data capture for asynchronous query job shape and missing-job behavior.

name: customerSegmentMembership
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap. Requires read_customers and unrestricted/protected-customer-data capture for membership boolean maps, unknown segment IDs, and empty responses.

name: customerSegmentMembersQueryCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_customers and protected-customer-data captures for asynchronous job identity, validation, and downstream query reads.

name: segmentCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_customers and protected-customer-data captures for ShopifyQL validation, unique names, and downstream segment catalog reads.

name: segmentUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_customers and protected-customer-data captures for ShopifyQL validation, rename behavior, and downstream member recalculation.

name: segmentDelete
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_customers and protected-customer-data captures for deletion payloads, unknown IDs, and downstream absence behavior.
